title: Oxygen Concentrator Malfunction — Poor Handling
scenario: Customer urgently reports a malfunctioning concentrator. Agent is dismissive, fails to check for backup oxygen, and offers no urgency.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: My oxygen machine stopped working, I can't breathe properly!

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Okay calm down. What's the model number?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I don't know — I need help now, I'm getting dizzy.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I need the model number to look up your account.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Ma'am, there's nothing I can do without the information. You should call 911 if it's an emergency.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I just need a working oxygen machine.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: We can schedule a replacement but it takes a few days. I need your account info first.
